items.title: The race to find routes around the Strait of Hormuz and which nation is winning

children.content: Amid uncertainty around the Strait of Hormuz, for months Gulf countries and oil companies have been finding ways to bypass the choke point.

items.title: Refinery shortages create new fuel crisis

children.content: There is a rapidly escalating supply crunch that has yet to show up on oil markets. While the price of crude has risen in the past week as the fragile Iran war ceasefire has crumbled, the remarkably restrained price moves have helped create a false sense of security.

image.altText: Donald Trump speaking at a national addresses behind a lecturn

items.title: Subsidy changes prompt battery installation collapse

children.content: Federal subsidies have ignited huge demand for batteries, but a tightening of the rules has experts warning of "boom and bust" cycles for the industry.

image.altText: Rooftops with solar panels and a graphic pof batteries

items.title: There's something odd about most couples. Geneticists and sociologists have noticed it too

children.content: Once I saw it, I couldn't unsee it. Had I noticed something real or was it just the people around me? I set out to find out what the data had to say.

items.title: Hanson dodges questions about who paid for Italy trip

children.content: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson refuses to say who paid for her recent trip to Italy, where she attended a fashion show and was spotted at a five-star resort.

items.title: Malcolm Roberts falsely claimed COVID-19 vaccines caused miscarriages

children.content: The One Nation senator made the previously unreported remarks during a live stream discussion with three prominent Australian anti-vaccine mandate activists.

image.altText: Pauline Hanson and Malcolm Roberts

items.title: Sam Neill's advice for when the world seems too dark

children.content: The world has been remembering Sam Neill's incredible film and television career in the wake of the actor's death, but his off-screen antics left a robust impact.

items.title: Going after the media a tried and true tactic of diversion

items.title: Sydney suburbs which recorded rent price drops, as 'real test' looms

items.title: Artist behind Clinton portrait in Epstein files remembers first piece

items.title: Drug-resistant hookworm found in growing number of retired greyhounds

children.content: Greyhound adoption groups and specialist vets say they're seeing a growing number of retired racing dogs infected with a deadly treatment-resistant parasite, raising concerns about animal welfare, adoption costs and the spread of the disease beyond the racing industry.

items.title: Eight killed, dozens missing as landslide buries people in China
